name: Create
description: Introduce a card from outside the game.

name: Haste
description: The card can be tapped on the turn it is played.

name: Summon
description: Move a card to the battlefield without playing it.

name: Assassinate X
description: Assault X, bypassing protection and invisibility.

name: Seize
description: Move a unit to its opponent's battlefield.

name: Overkill X
description: Triggers when an assault deals X excess damage.

name: Disloyal
description: The card is played to your opponent's battlefield.

name: Chaos X
description: Triggers if there are at least X unique mana types among common and allied mana dice.

name: Paired
description: Triggers if you play or control a second copy of this card.

name: Echo
description: Before drawing cards, move this card from graveyard to the top of your deck. The card is banished the second time it is played.

name: Imbibe
description: Triggers whenever a liquor card is equipped.

name: Labor
description: Triggers whenever played next to a Dwarf, or a Dwarf is played next to self.

name: Devour
description: Destroy a unit and increase own power by its power.

name: Plunder X
description: Gain X points when the unit is destroyed.

name: Harmony
description: Triggers whenever you play a unit with a unique racial category.

name: Diversity X
description: Triggers when you control X unique racial categories.

name: Devotion
description: Triggers if your starting deck contains no unaffiliated cards.

name: Veteran
description: Increase this unit's power at the start of the second and third round.

name: Purify
description: Remove all statuses from a unit.

name: Lock
description: Status that disables all of a card's abilities.

name: Poison
description: Status that destroys a unit if inflicted a second time.

name: Doomed
description: Status that banishes a card when it leaves the battlefield.

name: Bounty
description: When a unit with bounty is destroyed, the unit’s opponent may spawn 1 mana of any color for each bounty status it had.

name: Stalwart
description: At round end, units with this status are purified instead of destroyed. Equipment is also destroyed.

name: Protector
description: Status that prevents adjacent units from being targeted by their opponent. A protector cannot be protected.

name: Invisible
description: Status that prevents the unit from being targeted.

name: Immune
description: Status that prevents receiving additional statuses.
